title: Flaky Mexican Rigatoni Oozy Flan
description: A savory and sweet mexican dish featuring rigatoni pasta with a flan-like custard that combines flavors of binchotan-charcoal roasted vegetables.
instructions: Bring a pot of water to boil for rigatoni pasta.
Roast binchotan charcoal roasted vegetables in the preheated oven for about 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, in a mixing bowl combine avocado puree and plant-based egg replacer. Add salt and pepper.
Pour coconut milk into the mixture. Mix well until smooth.
Add roasted binchotan charcoal roasted vegetables to the mixture. Mix again.
Pour mixture evenly onto 4 rigatoni pasta shells, making sure not to overflow.
Bake in a preheated oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown on top and cooked through.
Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
